title: ユニコーンSの後に・砂塵を越えて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle pulls off running on dirt without a
hitch. With her gradually getting a feel for
competing on tracks, she's in excellent form.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Next up, the long-awaited Mile Championship!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're ready for the challenge... but there are
other affairs to attend to first! Taiki Shuttle is
looking to celebrate our hard work with a party.
